title: goeppertia angustifolia
intro: Goeppertia angustifolia, also known as Angustifolia Calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goeppertia angustifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
